dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: close > prev_close captures up breakout direction; volume > hvol_20 captures above-average candle volume. Exit: reversal when close < prev_close (inferred from AUTHOR_SILENT). Average rise of 6.92% suggests short hold period of ~5 days. hvol_20 used as proxy for average volume threshold.

source_rule_text: Up breakout with above-average candle volume
